title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Air India SATS - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Air India SATS - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Air India SATS are looking for an experienced Reservation Manager based out of Jaipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Air India SATS:
Air India SATS is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India SATS!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
